message:
fix(fcp-telemetry): async-aware context scoping, zero-ID normalization, and duplicate header rejection

context: add async-aware with_context that pushes/pops telemetry context
on poll. Add ensure_nonzero_id to to_traceparent() replacing zero IDs
with fresh random ones (invalid per W3C spec). Add interleaved futures
context isolation test.

tracing_layer: reject conflicting duplicate trace headers (return None
when multiple case-insensitive matches have different values). Add
normalize_trace_header_id for length/hex validation with zero-ID
replacement. Add tests for conflicting traceparent/tracestate duplicates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
